landing.headline: Pehla UI banao, backend pachhi jodo.
landing.description: Aa frontend strict API contracts ane mock adapter sathe taiyar chhe, etle hackathon ma speed ane stability male chhe.
landing.pointOne: Brand tokens, spacing ane breakpoints ekaj jagyae define chhe.
landing.pointTwo: Mock data backend contract jevu j structure follow kare chhe.
landing.pointThree: Language switch i18next sathe save thay chhe.
landing.pointFour: Left controls ane right table judge demo mate optimized chhe.

auth.title: Judge Demo Access

auth.required: Username ane password banne jaruri chhe.

dashboard.historyEmpty: History bharva pehla ek analysis chalu karo.
